## Checklist

> **Before you submit:** PRs for new features that haven't been discussed and accepted may be closed — please open an issue first. This keeps reviewer burden manageable and the project maintainable.

- [ ] `make lint` and `make test` pass locally.
- [ ] **New feature only:** it was proposed on https://feedback.hody.dev or in an issue, and a maintainer confirmed it's accepted.
- [ ] I've read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
